column1: EXECUTIVE MEMO: VENDOR CONSOLIDATION & COST OPTIMIZATION STRATEGY

column2: Vendor Consolidation Strategy - $850K Annual Savings Opportunity
A systematic analysis of 386 vendors representing $7.9M in annual spend has identified three strategic consolidation opportunities totaling $850,575 in annual recurring savings.
Salesforce $3.1M (39.5% of total spend) with multiple instances and editions
Consolidate to unified instance, negotiate 20% discount, eliminate unused licenses
Implement hybrid work policy, reduce footprint 25%, consolidate vendors
$454K across multiple travel vendors with inconsistent policies
Standardize through Navan, enforce pre-approval, negotiate preferred rates
Parallel execution of CRM, Real Estate, and Travel workstreams
Mitigation: Hire experienced Salesforce partner, parallel running
Mitigation: Diversify within vendors, annual contract review
Mitigation: Phased space reduction, contract negotiation
The identified opportunities represent low-risk, high-return initiatives
$850K annual recurring savings achievable within 4-6 months
Proceed with all three initiatives immediately
Schedule approval meeting with CEO/CFO this week
Confirm executive sponsors for each workstream
Launch CRM and Real Estate workstreams in parallel (Week 2)
Monthly steering committee reviews to track progress
